TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_budu, title = budu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/budu} }

S.FORM: == budu == vavain aicu a kadraidray makaya san vavain.
S.PHON: == budu == vavain aiʦu a kaɖaiɖaj makaja san vavain.
